fallback_contact.title: Black & McDonald Midwest office, Winnipeg (Unit 6 - 60 Dunlop Avenue)
fallback_contact.rationale: Black & McDonald is primarily a multi-trade contractor (electrical, mechanical, utilities) — paint is not a typical scope. Their Winnipeg office is at Unit 6 - 60 Dunlop Avenue. Lower fit for Ashrah, but they do operate as a GC on facility maintenance contracts. Phone the Midwest office; ask for facilities/PM department. Skip estimator angle — pursue them only if Ashrah wants industrial maintenance painting work.

needs_review_flags: Black & McDonald Winnipeg is utilities-focused — lower fit for commercial painting
Lower priority — recommend deprioritizing in favour of higher-fit GCs
If pursued, target should be facilities/maintenance lead, not estimator

sources.claim: David Bedeau — Senior Estimator Western Utilities Region (location not confirmed Winnipeg)
